source.title: Control of food approach and eating by a GABAergic projection from lateral hypothalamus to dorsal pons

confidence_rationale: Direct circuit evidence for an LH-to-pons GABAergic projection that engages food approach -- the existence proof for the active-coping override channel MECH-280 names. PNAS-tier cell-type-specific optogenetic dissection in mouse. Mapping is closer than de Araujo Salgado in the sense that LH is the named source, but farther in that the downstream target is peri-LC dorsal pons rather than PAG -- the projection biases active engagement rather than directly raising a freeze threshold.
failure_signatures: If the override channel were a single LH-to-PAG synapse, optogenetic LH-to-pons activation should leave PAG-mediated freezing intact; this paper documents that LH-to-pons activation by itself drives food approach, suggesting the active-coping override may operate via parallel routes (LH-to-pons for engagement, LH-to-PAG for threshold) rather than a single bottleneck.

The projection is GABAergic. If MECH-280 in REE is implemented as excitatory drive on theta_freeze, the sign of the underlying biology is opposite -- the override engages by disinhibition rather than by direct excitation.

mapping.source_claim_statement: An LH GABAergic projection to peri-locus-coeruleus / dorsal pons gates food approach and eating; optogenetic stimulation drives approach to food, inhibition reduces it.
mapping.ree_translation: The MECH-280 override projection (LH -> PAG raising freeze threshold under sustained metabolic demand) is one element of an LH-driven engagement system; this paper provides the existence proof for the LH side of that system and characterises a sister projection that biases engagement toward consummation.
mapping.mapping_caveat: The downstream target here is peri-LC dorsal pons rather than PAG, and the operation is GABAergic disinhibition rather than direct PAG threshold modulation. MECH-280's exact pathway is therefore not the one this paper records; the inference is that LH carries an active-coping engagement signal of which MECH-280's PAG-targeted override is one branch.
mapping.source_context: Mouse; cell-type-specific opto- and chemogenetics of LH GABAergic neurons projecting to peri-LC; behavioural readouts of food approach and consummation; in vitro slice electrophysiology to confirm projection synaptic properties.

confidence_components.notes: PNAS, projection-specific manipulation, internal anatomical and physiological controls. Mapping fidelity discounted because the named pathway is LH-to-pons rather than LH-to-PAG; the paper supports the existence of an LH active-coping override system but not the precise PAG channel MECH-280 specifies. Transfer risk standard mouse-to-REE.
